items.headline: Kaise Maine Ek Tech Video Ka CTR 48 Hours Mein 150% Badhaya!
items.strategy: ​"Is project mein maine '3D Psychology' aur 'High-Contrast Color Theory' ka use kiya. Pehle thumbnail bahut cluttered tha, maine use simplify karke main subject par 'Cyan & Orange' glow add kiya. Result? Sirf 24 ghante mein click-through rate 12% se badh gaya aur video organic search mein top rank par aa gayi. Ye professional style ab bade brands ki pehli pasand hai."
